label: Copper
description: Copper is a CRM built natively for Google Workspace, managing contacts, leads, and deals inside Gmail and Calendar.

form.title: Connect Copper
form.subtitle: Paste your Copper API key and login email to give Anton access to your CRM data.

methods.label: API Key
methods.description: Paste your Copper API key and the email address tied to your Copper account. Both are required on every request — takes about 30 seconds to set up.
methods.how_to:
## Generate a Copper API Key

Copper requires both an API key and the login email for every API request.

### Steps

1. Log in to [Copper](https://app.copper.com) and click your avatar in the bottom-left corner.
2. Go to **Settings → Integrations → API Keys**.
3. Click **Generate API Key**. Copy the key immediately — you can regenerate it later if needed.
4. Note the email address you use to log in to Copper (the one linked to your Google Workspace account).
5. Paste both into the fields below and click **Submit**.

### Notes

- Every API request must include both the key and the login email as headers; Anton handles this automatically once you save both values.
- If you regenerate the key in Copper's settings, return here and update it — the old key stops working immediately.
- Only Copper account admins can access the API Keys page. If the menu item is missing, ask your Copper admin to generate a key for you.
- Read [Copper's API authentication docs](https://developer.copper.com/#introduction) for full details.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Found in Copper → Settings → Integrations → API Keys. Click Generate API Key to create one.

fields.name: login_email
fields.label: Login Email
fields.description: The email address you use to sign in to Copper — required alongside the API key on every request.
